insight:
- The "Direct regression / Singulated / 2D grasp rectangle (x, y, width, height, angle)" group (5 methods) includes Dex-Net 1.0 (MV-CNNs), Dex-Net 2.0 (GQ-CNN), ggcnn_plus and 2 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Direct regression, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Grasp evaluation + Sampler / Singulated / Grasp success probability" group (11 methods) includes 🤖 GraspMolmo, 🤖 GraspQP, 7DGCG and 8 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Grasp evaluation + Sampler, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Reinforcement learning / Singulated / Grasp policy" group (11 methods) includes 🤖 GraspVLA, DeepRLManip, Dex-Net 2.1 and 8 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Reinforcement learning, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Sampling / Singulated / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (6 methods) includes Deep Dexterous Grasping (DDG), Deep Dexterous Grasping in Clutter (DDGC), GeomPickPlace and 3 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Sampling, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
- The "Direct regression / Structured / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (6 methods) includes 🤖 Equivariant Volumetric Grasping, CAPGrasp, Contact-GraspNet and 3 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Direct regression, Train: Sim, Scene: Structured.
- The "Sampling / Piled / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (11 methods) includes 6-DoF GraspNet, CaTGrasp, Edge Grasp Network and 8 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Sampling, Train: Sim, Scene: Piled.
- The "Direct regression / Singulated / 6-DoF grasp pose (x, y, z, r, p, y)" group (6 methods) includes 3DAPNet, AnyGrasp, Grasp Proposal Network (GPNet) and 3 more. Dominant attributes: Method: Direct regression, Train: Sim, Scene: Singulated.
